## Diamond Dental Care

We Care Your Comfort!

Diamond Multi-specialty Dental  Clinic is a modern dental clinic with branches situated in the prime locations of the pearl city Hyderabad. It is specialized in advanced diagnostics and treatment of dental and oral disorders.

Diamond Dental Clinic has always stood out from the others in spreading hundreds of smiles. We offer comprehensive services from all fields of dentistry. In addition to high-end dental equipment, all services are provided is a comfortable , luxury and haggle free environment .

## We Specialize in

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/Microscopic-e1640946846646.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/microscopic-dentistry/)

# Microscopic Dentistry

Extra level magnification providing with great care

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/Same-Day-Crown.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/same-day-crowns/)

## Same Day Crowns / CEREC

Avoid multiple appointments and complete your new crown treatment in one go at our clinic

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/image.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/teeth-whitening/)

## Teeth Whitening

Make your teeth visibly white by getting rid of extrinsic and intrinsic strains.

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/DSD.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/digital-smile-designing-dsd/)

## Digital Smile Designing

Digital smile designing is obtained through digital drawings inserted into facial photos that are defective or unappealing.

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/Root-Canal.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/microscopic-root-canal-treatment/)

## Root Canal

Our Root canal specialists diagnose the problem and treat in a single sitting

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/Child-Dentistry.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/child-dentistry/)

## Child Dentistry

Pediatric Dentists takes care of your child’s oral health from their infancy to adolescence

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/Braces.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/braces-or-clips/)

## Braces

Align, straighten, position & fix gaps in your teeth using Dental Braces that improves dental health

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/Laser-Gum.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/laser-gum-therapy/)

## Laser Gum Therapy

We clean your gums and teeth with effective Gum Therapy or Scaling & root planing

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/002-implant.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/implants/)

## Implants

An Implantologist places artificial tooth into your jaw to hold a replacement tooth

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/aligner.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/www.thediamonddental.com/aligners/)

## Aligners

Transparent & plastic form of dental braces used to adjust and correct the alignment of your teeth

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/Wisdom-Teeth.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wisdom-tooth-remove/)

## Wisdom Teeth Removal

Extract Third Molars before they erupt and cause infection leading to gum problems

[![](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/Orofacial-Pain.png)](https://www.thediamonddental.com/maxillofacial-trauma-surgery-tmj-orofacial-pain/)

## Orofacial Pain

Reduce Orofacial pain, a dysfunction in head or neck region that causes dental pain

## What Makes Us Unique?

![1-140x140-1](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/1-140x140-1.jpg)

## Hi-Quality Equipment

Equipped with the latest quality and purpose built dental operatory

![44-140x140-1](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/44-140x140-1.jpg)

## Advanced Dentistry

Quality dental care at your need  with the experienced dentists

![22-140x140-1](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/22-140x140-1.jpg)

## Comfortable Rooms

Provides an accessible space & comfortable atmosphere

![3-140x140-1](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/3-140x140-1.jpg)

## Friendly staff

The interactive and courteous staff helps you with all your queries

![sterilization-1](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/sterilization-1.png)

## Sterilisation

We follow high standards of sterlization right from the reception to the dental equipment

## Make Your Dental Health better & long lasting with

## Painless

Dental Treatments

Great news for those who are bearing the dental pain silently. We know & realize how scary/painful the very thought of drilling into your teeth or getting them removed can be, we make your dental treatment a pain free/ comforting experience.

As a measure of pain management, we provide a stress free mindset for you through our “one-of-its-kind” music therapy. The soothing music that is played continuously in our dental office, helps in relieving your pain to a certain extent as it proves to be a useful strategy in distracting your mind. Researchers suggest that this is a powerful means to alleviate pain, stress & anxiety as it helps in self-distraction. This is similar to breathing exercises during cramps. It is also suggested that music helps to stimulate the production of Endorpins,& Catechol amines- the very hormones which help reducing your stress levels.

![Dr Arvind Nahata - Diamond Dental Hospital](https://www.thediamonddental.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/Doctor.jpg)

## Meet

Dr. Arvind Nahata

Dr. Arvind Nahata, holding BDS & MDS degree in Prosthodontics & Implantology and has contributed immensely in spreading healthy smiles ever since past more than a decade. He has also undergone an advance training from the University of Kentucky for Temporo Mandibular Disorders. Dr Arvind Nahata holds a fellowship in Digital Smile Designing under the guidance of Dr. Eduardo from Spain.

- Lifetime member of Indian Dental Association
- Member of Indian Prosthodontic Society
- Member of SOLA (Vienna, Austria)
- Member of CEREC Club (America)

He has also been awarded for his paper & poster presentations in various national and international conferences. Urge to gain more knowledge and be at par with the latest advancements in Dental Technology, made Dr. Arvind Nahata attend various international conferences worldwide.

[Contact Us](https://www.thediamonddental.com/contact-us/ "")
